templates.title: Ask for UID
templates.text: Please send your AgentOn UID so we can check your account.

templates.title: Ask for wallet
templates.text: Please send the wallet address connected to your AgentOn account.

templates.title: Ask for evidence
templates.text: Please send the relevant screenshots, quest link, and transaction hash if available.

templates.title: We are checking
templates.text: Thank you. Our team is checking this and will update you as soon as possible.

templates.title: Need more time
templates.text: We are still investigating this issue. Thank you for your patience.
